'''kabutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbuilder|roadbuilder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbuilder|roadbuilder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kabutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæbitith|kæbitith]] || [[word:kæbitij|kæbitij]] || [[word:kæbitish|kæbitish]] || [[word:kæbiti|kæbiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kabubututh|kabubututh]] || [[word:kabubutuj|kabubutuj]] || [[word:kabubutush|kabubutush]] || [[word:kabubutu|kabubutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kabututh|kabututh]] || [[word:kabutuj|kabutuj]] || [[word:kabutush|kabutush]] || [[word:kabutu|kabutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kabuftuth|kabuftuth]] || [[word:kabuftuj|kabuftuj]] || [[word:kabuftush|kabuftush]] || [[word:kabuftuf|kabuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kabututhu|kabututhu]] || [[word:kabutuju|kabutuju]] || [[word:kabutushu|kabutushu]] || [[word:kabutuku|kabutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kabututh|kabututh]] || [[word:kabutuj|kabutuj]] || [[word:kabutush|kabutush]] || [[word:kabutu|kabutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kabututhul|kabututhul]] || [[word:kabutujul|kabutujul]] || [[word:kabutushul|kabutushul]] || [[word:kabutukul|kabutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kabututhuthu|kabututhuthu]] || [[word:kabutujuju|kabutujuju]] || [[word:kabutushushu|kabutushushu]] || [[word:kabutuku|kabutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kabututhun|kabututhun]] || [[word:kabutujun|kabutujun]] || [[word:kabutushun|kabutushun]] || [[word:kabutukun|kabutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kabututhuoro|kabututhuoro]] || [[word:kabutujuoro|kabutujuoro]] || [[word:kabutushuoro|kabutushuoro]] || [[word:kabutukuoro|kabutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
